item.title: Tanglewood Evolution TAB1-CE 2009 - Natural — $308.34
item.description:
$308.34 · Very Good · Guy's Guitars

Up for sale is a beautiful, 2009 Tanglewood Evolution TAB1-CE 4-string electro-acoustic bass guitar in a gorgeous Natural Satin finish. This model comes paired with its original, rare, fitted Tanglewood-branded heavy-duty hard-shell case—an essential accessory since these Super Jumbo bodies require a specialized fit!Dating from August 2009 (Serial: KH090801720), this bass belongs to the highly regarded Evolution IV generation. It offers a warm, woody acoustic tone that is perfect for sofa practice, acoustic jam sessions, or writing. When plugged in, the premium factory-installed Fishman preamp gives you complete stage control with an onboard chromatic tuner, phase reversal (to combat stage feedback), and a handy contour/mid-scoop switch.Specifications & Key Features:

  • Body Shape: Super Jumbo Bass with Venetian Cutaway
  • Top: Spruce
  • Back & Sides: Mahogany
  • Neck: Mahogany (one-piece) with a slim, highly playable profile
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood, 22 frets
  • Scale Length: Long scale (864mm / 34 inches)
  • Electronics: Fishman Preamp & Pickup system with built-in LED Tuner
  • Hardware: Chrome die-cast tuners, Maple body binding, NuBone nut & saddle
  • Case: Authentic, plush-lined Tanglewood Hard Case with all latches fully functioning.

Condition Report:

  • The Bass: In excellent aesthetic and functional condition for its age. The satin finish is smooth, and the top is perfectly flat under standard tension. There is a small scratch and a Maltese cross which could be bleached in or the remnants of a sticker that was removed. The neck is straight, the action is comfortable, to make it lower it would need a new nut and the saddle filing down, the frets show minimal wear. The neck has a split/crack at the headstock, which doesn’t affect the playability, but would benefit from a repair. The Fishman electronics, pickup, and built-in tuner have been tested and work flawlessly with no scratchy pots.
  • The Case: Structurally solid with a clean interior. All latches catch securely, and the handle is perfectly sturdy. Shows normal light scuffs on the exterior Tolex from storage.

Shipping & Collection:
Due to the substantial size and weight of a Super Jumbo hard case, local collection/pickup is highly preferred (located in CV10 Nuneaton, Warwickshire). However, I am willing to pack it securely in a dedicated guitar box and ship it via tracked courier if required.Please feel free to message me with any questions or if you would like to see any additional photos! Thanks for looking.

item.title: Fender Mustang Bass 1975 Black — $3,575.86
item.description:
$3,575.86 · Very Good · bassNguitar

With its short 30-inch scale length and compact size, this Mustang Bass will appeal to guitarists and players with smaller hands alike! This 1975 model in black with a black pickguard is a perfect example of the 1970s aesthetic. The maple neck features a rosewood fingerboard with a 7.25-inch radius. Its split pickup is close in character to that of a Precision Bass. Note the absence of the bridge mutes. Sold with a gigbag.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1972 NOS Custom Shop 1995 Natural Yamano John Page — $3,814.65
item.description:
$3,814.65 · Good · bassNguitar

Introduced in 1960, the Jazz Bass quickly established itself as a benchmark on the market. This one takes its cues from the ’70s design, featuring white block inlays (which have nicely aged and were refinished along with the fingerboard by luthier Jean-Baptiste Prodhomme) on a 7.25-inch radius maple fingerboard, complemented by binding along the maple neck. The body is made of ash and is joined to the neck with a four-bolt neck plate. This Jazz Bass is a Yamano model, intended for the Japanese distributor, who—according to legend—was known for selecting instruments more rigorously. Dating from 1995, it also comes from the highly regarded John Page era. Sold without its COA (a replacement can be requested from Fender), in its original case.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Danelectro Dano '63 Long Scale Black — $614.88
item.description:
$614.88 · Good · bassNguitar

Danelectro used to produce affordable guitars in the U.S. by using clever and innovative construction methods (nowadays they’re made in China, but they still work great!). Dano bodies are typically hollow and made of masonite. Among the brand’s ambassadors are J.J. Cale, Jimmy Page, and Eric Clapton. This is a long-scale bass in good condition.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.description:

However, the original pickups have been replaced with an excellent pair of DiMarzio DP120 Model Ones. The tuners are now Schaller. Like its Jazz and Precision Bass siblings, it has a 34-inch scale length. The maple fingerboard has a 9.5-inch radius.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass Vintera '50s Dakota Red 2022 — $1,025.60
item.description:
$1,025.60 · Very Good · bassNguitar

A pioneer among basses, the P-bass was released in 1951 but didn't reach its "definitive" form until 1957. Here is an example from the excellent Vintera series. The beautiful Vintage C profile, with maple fingerboards and a 7.25-inch radius, is mounted on a body finished in a beautiful Dakota Red, matching the anodized pickguard. This particular bass is in very good condition.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress 24-Fret Modern Bass 5-String Sunburst 2024 — $1,014.85
item.description:
$1,014.85 · Very Good · bassNguitar

The MetroExpress is the more accessible version of Roger Sadowsky’s renowned basses, while retaining the core elements that define their reputation: a modern, clean tone that sits perfectly in the mix. This 5-string, made in China under Warwick/Sadowsky supervision, features a compact okoumé body, a bolt-on roasted maple neck with 24 frets, and the brand’s typical 2-band active/passive electronics. The soapbar pickups deliver a precise, deep, and well-balanced sound, with powerful yet tight lows and smooth highs. Very comfortable thanks to its reasonable 3.84 kg weight and modern ergonomics, it suits slap, fusion, gospel, funk, or modern rock equally well. It stands today as one of the benchmarks in the “accessible premium modern bass” segment.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: Cort Artisan C5 Deluxe – Candy Red — $642.04
item.description:
$642.04 · Brand New · Club Bass

Cort Artisan C5 Deluxe 5-String bass is a game changer bass.

Cort has been perfecting their craft for over 50 years. They’ve teamed up with legends like Greg Curbow and Ned Steinberger to create designs that musicians rave about. Plus, they make instruments for brands like Ibanez and PRS, so chances are, you’ve already experienced their incredible quality without even realizing it.

Poplar Body

Poplar is a fine tonewood that is reminiscent of Alder in sonic character. Full sounding with strong mids and a firm low-end that’s well balanced across the tonal spectrum, Poplar suits a variety of musical genres and playing styles for both electric guitars and basses.

Hard Maple Neck With Jabota Fingerboard

The combination of a Hard Maple neck and Jatoba fretboard provides tone balance and stability, as well as long sustaining durability.

Bartolini® MK-1 Pickups

The trademark Bartolini® sound is preserved in the MK-1 while providing outstanding sound quality and value. The MK-1 delivers plenty of punchy and warm mids along with transparent and brilliant highs for a superbly balanced sound.

MarkBass® MB Instrument Pre Preamp

Markbass® MB-1 preamp provides Cort C5 Deluxe bass with a very natural and transparent boost that does not color the organic nature or resonance of the instrument’s woods. The combination of crystal clarity and natural warmth exudes a passive feel with smooth lows, full-bodied mids, and bell-like highs.

Cort Artisan C5 Deluxe 5-String Bass - Serial #IE240502934

Weight: 9 lb.

Body: Poplar
Body Finish: Candy Red
Neck Material: Hard Maple
Neck Shape: C
Fingerboard Material: Jatoba
Fingerboard Inlay: White dots
Fingerboard Radius: 15.75", 400㎜
Frets: 24
Scale: 34", 864㎜

Preamp: Markbass® MB-1 Active with 3-band EQ
Controls: Volume, Blend, Active/Passive mode switch, Bass, Mid, Treble

item.title: Aria Pro II CSB-300 Cardinal Series MIJ collectors choice — $776.06
item.description:
$776.06 · Very Good · HGear

Aria Pro II Cardinal Series CSB-300 – Made in Japan – Vintage Bass in Red

The Aria Pro II Cardinal Series CSB-300 is one of the hidden gems of early-1980s Japanese bass production. Built at the legendary Matsumoku factory, it combines outstanding craftsmanship, excellent playability, and a punchy, characterful tone that has earned these basses a loyal following among vintage enthusiasts.

Its 32-inch medium scale offers the perfect balance between the comfort of a short-scale bass and the clarity and definition of a full-scale instrument. The powerful split-coil humbucker delivers warm lows, punchy mids, and excellent articulation, making it equally at home in rock, indie, alternative, punk, and pop.

The CSB-300 is especially sought after thanks to its connection with alternative rock icon Kim Deal, who famously played a red Aria Pro II Cardinal bass during her years with Pixies in the 1980s, contributing to the unmistakable bass sound heard on many classic recordings.

Today, Japanese-made Cardinal basses are widely regarded as exceptional value in the vintage market. They offer build quality that rivals far more expensive instruments while maintaining their own unique identity and unmistakable tone.

A genuine Made-in-Japan vintage bass with outstanding craftsmanship, distinctive sound, and a place in alternative rock history.

Personal collection is highly recommended. If you have any questions, feel free to ask!

I am a private seller. I exclude return and liability for material defects. Since the device is a few years old: With his purchase, the buyer accepts the item condition "purchased as seen" and bears the shipping risk. I always take care of professional packaging, see my reviews.

[Slightly damaged special price]

This is a signature model of Pete Wentz, the bassist and founding member of Fall Out Boy, an enduring icon of punk rock, emo, and other sounds.

Pete's signature Sterling by Music Man Artist Series StingRay is rooted in the pop-punk scene while incorporating modern playability. Its passive Alnico V humbuckers deliver vintage-style warmth and punch, while simple controls ensure seamless performance.

Custom Loon inlays, black hardware, and anodized gold pickguard define Pete's distinctive style. The roasted maple neck, 3+1 headstock, and contoured body provide comfortable playability and tuning stability. Whether jamming in the garage or diving into stadiums, this StingRay delivers the versatile playability and dynamic sound that epitomizes Pete's rebellious spirit.


Passive Electronics: Ideal for players who prefer simple controls, this passive bass delivers classic, dynamic tone with a single humbucking pickup and tone/volume knobs, while delivering straightforward, reliable performance and versatility.

Pete Wentz Custom Design: Pete reimagined the Stingray with black hardware, a gold pickguard, and a "beautiful yet downright spooky" shoebill inlay design at the 12th fret.

Exceptional Playability: The roasted maple neck, 3+1 headstock, and contoured body ensure comfortable playing feel and rock-solid tuning stability, making it ready for any situation.

*There are some minor scratches that are not visible in the photo, but you can use it without any problems.
*The image is a sample. Due to the nature of the product, the grain and color may vary from piece to piece.

item.title: Richwood RB-102-CEBK Akustikbass + Gigbag !!Elektronik defekt!! — $149.24
item.description:
$149.24 · Non Functioning · Tieftontobi

Ich verkaufe meinen Richwood RB-102-CEBK Akustikbass, da er bei mir kaum noch zum Einsatz kommt.


Der Bass wurde über die letzten rund 10 Jahre nur gelegentlich gespielt und befindet sich insgesamt in einem guten gebrauchten Zustand. Alters- und nutzungsbedingte Gebrauchsspuren sowie einige kleinere Macken bleiben bei einem Instrument dieses Alters natürlich nicht aus (siehe Bilder) insgesamt ist der Zustand aber gepflegt.


Aufgezogen sind D’Addario Chromes Flatwound-Saiten, die dem Bass einen angenehm warmen und ausgewogenen Klang verleihen.


Wichtig:

Die eingebaute Elektronik ist defekt. Nach Prüfung durch das Music Center Dortmund funktioniert die Elektronik bzw. der Vorverstärker nicht mehr. Der Piezo-Tonabnehmer selbst ist jedoch voll funktionsfähig. Der Bass lässt sich selbstverständlich weiterhin ganz normal akustisch spielen und eignet sich auch für alle, die die Elektronik reparieren oder ersetzen möchten.


Zum Angebot gehört außerdem ein passendes Gigbag vom MUSIC STORE Köln, das den Bass sicher transportiert und schützt.


Kurz zusammengefasst:


* Richwood RB-102-CEBK Akustikbass

* D’Addario Chromes Flatwound-Saiten

* Gepflegter Gebrauchtzustand mit üblichen Gebrauchsspuren

* Elektronik defekt, Piezo-Tonabnehmer funktionstüchtig

* Inklusive passendem Gigbag vom MUSIC STORE Köln


Privatverkauf unter Ausschluss jeglicher Gewährleistung, Garantie und Rücknahme.


Am liebsten wäre mir angucken, anspielen und abholen vor Ort (58675 Hemer, gibt auch Kaffee), aber auf Wunsch versende ich auch. Hierbei besprechen wir Kosten und Versandart individuell.

item.title: Gibson Les Paul Junior Tribute DC Bass Left-Handed 2019 - 2024 - Worn Cherry — $1,261.39
item.description:
$1,261.39 · Good · Guy's Gear Garage

Perfect for southpaw bass slingers and low end maestros! Strung with silky smooth La Bella Deep Talkin’ strings for that vintage sound. Comes with an Ibanez Powerpad Ultra Gig Bag. Doesn’t come with the guitar stand in the pics I’m afraid. There’s a few dinks as you would expect (see pics) but this is a pretty solid bit of kit!

Specifications

Series: Les Paul Junior
Material: Mahogany
Finish: Worn Ebony
Neck and Fingerboard
Neck: Maple
Profile: Rounded
Nut Width: 1.6" / 40.64mm
Fingerboard: Rosewood
Scale Length: 30.5" / 774.7mm
Number of Frets: 20
Nut: Graph Tech
Inlays: Acrylic Dots
Hardware and Electronics
Bridge: 3-Point Adjustable
Knobs: Black Top Hats
Tuners: Hipshot Ultra-Light Mini-Clovers
Plating: Chrome
Neck Pickup: BassBucker

The Les Paul Junior Tribute DC Bass is a tribute to the historic Gibson EB-0 bass from the late 50's, but with modern features. Not just for smaller players, the short scale length is actually chosen by many for its strong fundamental tone and sits perfectly in a track when recording. The mahogany double cutaway body and maple neck with rosewood fingerboard balances perfectly when playing either sitting or strapped on. It's equipped with a single expanded range LP BassBucker pickup with single volume and tone controls for simplicity. The volume pot has a push-pull feature to coil tap the pickup scooping the mids for further tone shaping possibilities.

item.title: Schecter J-5 bass in Gloss Black — $1,049
item.description:
$1,049 · Brand New · LV Guitars

Schecter J-5 Electric Bass in Black

The Schecter J-5 combines a slim, comfortable neck profile with an ergonomic body contour that makes extended playing sessions feel natural. The dual MonsterTone-J pickups deliver articulate, punchy tone with impressive clarity across the frequency spectrum, capable of everything from warm vintage character to modern aggression depending on playing dynamics. This is a versatile instrument that responds authentically to both aggressive slap techniques and delicate fingerstyle work.

Playability & Construction

The thin "C"-profile maple neck with rosewood fingerboard is dimensioned at .787" at the first fret and .866" at the 12th fret, creating a fast, comfortable playing experience. The alder body with bolt-on construction and flat top contour provides excellent resonance and sustain, while the 35-inch scale length delivers tight low-end response and clear articulation across all five strings.

Tone & Electronics

The USA MonsterTone-J pickups in both neck and bridge positions offer flexible tonal control through dual volume controls and a tone knob with push-pull coil tap, allowing you to shape your sound from fat and warm to bright and aggressive. The Schecter Custom bass bridge with string-thru or top-load capability ensures stable intonation and resonant sustain, while the Graph Tech XL Ivory Tusq nut contributes clarity and harmonic definition to every note.

Key Features
  • 5-string configuration, right-handed, gloss black finish
  • Alder body with bolt-on maple neck in Thin "C" profile
  • Rosewood fingerboard with 21 narrow X-jumbo frets and offset dot inlays
  • 35-inch (889 mm) scale length with 16-inch (406 mm) fingerboard radius
  • Schecter USA MonsterTone-J pickups in neck and bridge positions
  • Dual volume controls and tone control with push-pull coil tap
  • Metal knurled knobs with set screws
  • Graph Tech XL Ivory Tusq nut, 1.771" width
  • Schecter Custom bass bridge with string-thru or top-load capability
  • Black hardware throughout
  • 2-way adjustable truss rod with heel-access spoke wheel
  • Includes Ernie Ball 5-String Super Long strings (.045–.130)

The Schecter J-5 delivers the versatility and tonal character demanded by working bassists across rock, funk, R&B, and fusion contexts.

item.title: Breedlove Solo Bass FL Jumbo Cutaway Fretless Acoustic/Electric Bass Guitar 2016 - Gloss Natural — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · Luis's Gear Outlet

This bass is AMAZING! If you've never played a fretless instrument, you have to treat yourself. You can mess around with 3rd notes and stuff like that. Less buzz issues because there is no fret buzz or fret contact. And it's great to memorize your place on the neck without a fret or fret marker to tell you. All original parts. Strap included. You are basically buying a brand new bass. This bass was always kept in a temperature controlled room. Never dropped, no picking signs (played with fingers). Never taken on the road. If you look a the backside picture you can see there are no signs of belt buckle wear or scratches. Only selling because I have too many guitars and this one isn’t getting enough play time.

item.title: MUSIC MAN StingRay 4 - Natural - [4.00kg][2013s] — $2,118.72
item.description:
$2,118.72 · Very Good · Kurosawa Music Ochanomizu

*Caution!!

To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.

Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.



Development began in 1971 by a small group that included Leo Fender, and sales began in 1976.

It has enjoyed consistent popularity from its release to the present day, and is now becoming a classic model on par with the Jazz Bass and Precision Bass.

It’s a model favored by numerous world-renowned musicians, such as Louis Johnson and Free, and is likely one that any bassist who’s seen it has dreamed of owning at least once.


This is a USA-made Stingray manufactured around 2013.

Its natural finish—made with ash wood, which is no longer part of the current lineup—and its classic “Stingray” aesthetic, featuring a maple neck and maple fingerboard, are major selling points.


The Stingray, equipped with a 9V 3-band equalizer, is known for its powerful sound and was likely regarded as one of the standard basses alongside the Precision Bass and Jazz Bass.



It shows signs of wear appropriate for its age, such as discoloration on the parts and minor dents and scratches.

With over 80% of the frets remaining, plenty of truss rod adjustment left, and no issues with the controls, it’s still fully playable.




Don’t miss out.

item.description:
$2,118.72 · Very Good · Kurosawa Music Ochanomizu

*Caution!!

To prevent fraudulent purchases, we do not accept PayPal guest checkout.

Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.




Xotic Bass quickly gained widespread recognition thanks to its adoption by players from all genres, both in Japan and abroad—

including bass legends like Chuck Rainey and rising stars like Travis Carlton.

Its reputation as “the one bass that can handle an entire set” has been proven time and again,

and behind this success lies the company’s extensive hands-on experience cultivated over many years in the effects pedal industry,

packed with sophisticated technology designed with the player in mind.


It features classic specifications—an alder body and rosewood fingerboard—along with original pickups and a Trilogic preamp.

The maple neck boasts a beautiful, tightly grained figure.

Although this instrument was made in 2013, it is in excellent cosmetic condition.


Perhaps because it’s over 10 years old, it has a wonderful tone.

Compared to current models, the original pickups beautifully capture the aggressive, slightly unruly character of the instrument without losing any detail, and the preamp adds depth to the sound.

Whether you’re playing with distortion or clean, you’ll enjoy an active sound that makes you want to play it both ways.

Of course, we also recommend using it in passive mode. It offers the organic texture characteristic of classic jazz basses.


There is plenty of adjustment range left in the truss rod and frets, and the electronics are currently in good working order.


Don’t miss this opportunity.


Body - Alder

Neck - Maple with Rosewood Fingerboard

Frets - 6150 Type NS

Tuners - Hipshot Ultralite

Pickups - Xotic Original Pickups

Preamp - Tri-logic2 Preamp

Date of Build - October 2013

Country of Origin - Japan

We’ve just received a guitar that combines Ken Smith’s top-grade wood with Japan’s world-renowned craftsmanship.


This instrument features a premium-grade maple neck, a MacArthur ebony fingerboard, a slightly larger-than-average alder body, and Nordstrand custom pickups.

The neck and fingerboard materials were supplied by Ken Smith, and the guitar was manufactured and set up in Japan.


Needless to say, this instrument boasts the exceptional precision and quality that are the hallmarks of Japanese-made instruments,

but it has shed the characteristic “stiffness” often associated with Japanese-made instruments, and its distinctive tone likely stems from the wood itself.


From wood selection to construction methods and setup,

this is a masterpiece that embodies the expertise and craftsmanship of three companies.


Although it is a used instrument and the black finish makes scratches more noticeable, it remains in relatively good condition.

The truss rod and frets have plenty of life left, and there are currently no issues with the electronics.

item.title: FBS Music Joe Dart replica 2024 - Natural — $2,137.16
item.description:
$2,137.16 · Excellent · Groove'N'Gear

For sale: this stunning handmade bass, built in France by the luthier FBS Music.

This bass is heavily inspired by the Music Man Sterling Joe Dart.

It features an ash body with a maple neck and maple fingerboard.

All of the woods, sourced in France, were meticulously selected by FBS and are absolutely beautiful.

The neck measures 38 mm (1.5") at the nut, just like a Jazz Bass and a Music Man Sterling. The bass is lightweight (around 3.7 kg / 8.2 lbs), exceptionally well built, and professionally set up. It is currently strung with Ernie Ball flatwound strings.

The pickup is a passive, hand-wound Music Man-style humbucker, wound by FBS himself.

The tone is remarkably close to Joe Dart's signature sound: full of character, with outstanding dynamics and punchy mids. The flatwound strings smooth out the highs, and unlike the original, this bass features a dual-concentric control with an integrated tone knob, offering additional tonal versatility.

item.title: Yamaha RBX270 4-String Electric Bass Guitar - Gloss Black with Gig Bag — $275
item.description:
$275 · Excellent · Austin's Gear Outlet

Yamaha RBX270 4-String Bass Guitar - Gloss Black

Up for sale is a beautiful Yamaha RBX270 4-string bass guitar in excellent cosmetic and playing condition. This is a phenomenal, lightweight workhorse instrument perfect for both players looking for a reliable backup and beginners wanting a rock-solid instrument that stays in tune.

This model features a solid body with a double cutaway design, a comfortable maple neck, and a rosewood fingerboard. It is equipped with a versatile, completely passive PJ pickup configuration (a split-coil middle pickup and a single-coil bridge pickup), allowing you to dial in everything from deep, classic thud to bright, modern punch.

Condition Notes:

Cosmetics: Excellent condition. The gloss black finish is incredibly clean with excellent shine, showing only minimal, light handling wear. The chrome hardware and bridge are bright and free of heavy oxidation.

Neck & Frets: The neck is straight, the truss rod functions as it should, and the frets show little wear with plenty of life left.

Electronics: Clean and fully functional.

What’s Included:

Yamaha RBX270 4-String Bass

Vintage Spector padded faux-leather gig bag (excellent quality, thick padding)

Detachable shoulder straps

The case has one D ring that has ripped (see pictures) doesn't affect use.

The bass will be packed securely and shipped promptly. Please feel free to reach out with any questions!

item.title: Shabat Guitars Cougar Bass - Fiesta Red Matching Head — $4,498.16
item.description:
$4,498.16 · Brand New · MIYAJI GUITARS KANDA

The popular Shabat bass. The JB-style Cougar bass is now in stock.

It features a premium-grade flamed roasted maple neck with a matched headstock!


Shabat Guitars turns its back on mass production, steadfastly maintaining high quality through small-batch production.

It is a guitar workshop where a team of just five elite specialists—covering fields such as woodworking, finishing, and assembly—craft each instrument.


Founder Avi Shabat is so committed to the craft that he states, “There are no shortcuts to building a perfect guitar.” He makes absolutely no compromises in the manufacturing process,

strictly overseeing every step—from selecting the finest wood to assembly, finishing, and aging—under rigorous quality control.


The Cougar Bass we’ve just received stays true to the vintage JB style while offering a sound and playability that perfectly suit today’s music scene.


Its most striking feature is undoubtedly the dense flame pattern that appears throughout the straight-grained roasted maple.

It’s extremely rare to find maple suitable for a neck with this level of figure.

The body is crafted from carefully selected two-piece alder. We’ve chosen high-quality wood that keeps the total weight at approximately 4 kg—quite lightweight for a bass.


The rosewood fingerboard, elegantly bound, features a compound radius ranging from 7.25 to 9.5 inches.

The block inlays also contribute to its striking appearance.


The finish, with its subtle aging details, is another highlight of this instrument.

The Festa Red—a popular choice even among vintage models—features a special-spec matching headstock. Thanks to the aging process, it exudes a sophisticated aura that goes beyond mere flashiness.


The pickups are Lollar J models. Their sound, which stays true to vintage roots while remaining relevant today, covers all genres, from fingerstyle to slap. While JB-type pickups are inherently versatile, these take that sound to the next level.


Abi Shabat makes absolutely no compromises when it comes to sourcing materials; in fact, wood suppliers in LA reportedly only present him with wood that meets his exacting standards. This results in a level of quality that would be virtually impossible to achieve through mass production.


The biggest selling point of Shabat Guitars is the sound. The quality becomes apparent the moment you play it—we strongly encourage you to experience it for yourself.


BODY: Alder


NECK: PREMIUM GRADE 4A-5A Flame-Roasted Maple

NECK PROFILE: Modern C (0.88–0.98”)

Radius: 7.25–9.5 compound

Fretboard: Rosewood

Inlay: Pearloid Blocks

Binding: Neck binding

Fretwire: Dunlop 6100 nickel-silver


Headstock: 4-In-Line

NUT: 1.55” TUSQ (Cougar neck)

HARDWARE: Aged Nickel

TUNERS: E Standard

BRIDGE: Gotoh 203B-4

PICKUPS: Lollar J

Pickguard: 3-ply Parchment


FINISH: Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Finish: Solid color—specify in notes / Matching headstock—specify in notes

NOTES: Fiesta Red nitro finish, fully matching headstock


Weight: 4.06kg

item.title: Shabat Guitars Panther Bass - Shell Pink Over Burst — $3,294.35
item.description:
$3,294.35 · Brand New · MIYAJI GUITARS KANDA

The popular Shabat bass. The PB-style Panther bass is now in stock.

Pink multi-layer finish over a burst finish!


Shabat Guitars turns its back on mass production, steadfastly maintaining high quality through small-batch production.

It is a guitar workshop where a team of just five elite specialists—covering woodworking, finishing, and assembly—craft each instrument.


Founder Avi Shabat is so adamant about the process that he states, “There are no shortcuts to building a perfect guitar.” He makes absolutely no compromises,

strictly overseeing every step—from selecting top-tier wood to assembly, finishing, and aging—under rigorous quality control.


The Panther Bass now in stock is a model that recreates the vintage PB style.

The body is crafted from carefully selected two-piece alder. The neck is a one-piece quarter-sawn maple.

It features a compound radius fretboard, offering exceptional playability.


Because Abi Shabat makes absolutely no compromises when sourcing materials, wood suppliers in LA reportedly only present him with wood that meets his exacting standards.

The well-balanced alder body and the quarter-sawn neck—which is clearly the result of rigorous selection—boast a level of quality that would be virtually impossible to achieve through mass production.


The paintwork has consistently impressed even the most discerning guitar connoisseurs.

The body color, named “Shell Pink over Burst,” is first finished with a 3-Tone Sunburst and then overpainted to recreate a multi-layer effect.

The overall finish features a subtle aged effect, evoking a vintage feel.


This model is equipped with Lollar P Split-Coil pickups.

It’s a reliable bass that delivers powerful low and mid-range tones.


High quality crafted by a group of top-tier artisans in LA.

Please pick one up and experience it for yourself.


BODY: Alder

NECK: Quartersawn hard maple

NECK PROFILE: Modern C

Radius: 7.25–9.5 compound

SCALE LENGTH: 34″

NUT: TUSQ XL

FRETS: Dunlop 6100 Nickel/Silver,

HARDWARE: Nickel

TUNERS: Schaller BM

BRIDGE: Gotoh 203B-4

PICKUPS: Lollar P Split-Coil

ELECTRONICS: CTS pots with Orange Drop capacitors

FINISH: Nitrocellulose Lacquer

STRINGS: D’Addario .045–.105

CASE: G&G Custom Hardshell

Finish: Pink over burst

item.title: Fujigen (FGN) JMJ52-AL-R -Black- #D250133[4.68kg][Made in Japan] — $1,085.20
item.description:
$1,085.20 · Brand New · Kurosawa Music Ikebukuro

----- *Important Notice!!


To prevent fraudulent purchases, PayPal guest checkout is not available.


Please create a PayPal account before payment.

*It appears possible to pay by credit card on the Reverb marketplace without using PayPal; however, this actually processes the transaction as a PayPal guest checkout, and the order is not valid.

-----

Welcome to Kurosawa Ikebukuro! We ship worldwide!!


Thank you for viewing!


Please feel free to contact us with any questions.


Also, please carefully read the shop policy located below the guitar description.


-----------------------------------------

Highly recommended for those who want the best of both the StingRay and Jazz Bass worlds!



It features a glossy black finish—the classic, mirror-like look.

It exudes a premium feel and shines beautifully under stage lighting.

Because it complements any outfit or band concept, this popular color is a versatile choice to have in your arsenal.

Paired with a tortoiseshell pickguard, it radiates a sophisticated, mature, vintage vibe.

The biggest advantage of a black bass is that you’ll never get tired of the look!



The clarity of the 5th string (Low-B) is likely due in part to this instrument's substantial weight.

Since a narrow strap might dig into your shoulder, we recommend using a wide leather strap or a padded one.

That look actually enhances your stage presence, giving you the appearance of a tough, professional player.



◆＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿ ◆



【Sound】

The overall sound is characterized by powerful, thick, and deep low-end tones.

True to its name ("Mighty"), it delivers a robust sound that prioritizes thickness and stability across all strings—from low to high—leaning heavily into modern tonal qualities.


It is equipped with the classic Seymour Duncan SJ5-3n pickup in the neck position.

The bridge position features the SMB-5D.

Utilizing large pole pieces, it produces a deep, punchy low end that is significantly thicker than that of a standard Jazz Bass.

Its powerful, percussive nature makes it an excellent fit for genres where you want the bass to have a distinct, commanding presence within the ensemble.



It pairs particularly well with genres like funk, R&B, rock, punk, and pop.

The hallmark of the StingRay style is slap playing that takes advantage of crisp highs and thick lows.

Even when played fingerstyle, every note is articulate, making it ideal for funky phrases that emphasize the groove. It also delivers a gritty, punchy attack when played with a pick, along with a solid core tone that remains defined even with distortion.

It cuts through even the most aggressive guitar mixes, providing powerful low-end support.

It is ideal for players who want to provide a solid foundation for vocal-driven songs while also having the ability to produce flashy tones during slap passages or heavier sections. Since the sound remains clear even with down-tuning, it is also highly recommended for loud rock and metal genres.

It also features a coil-tap function, allowing you to instantly reduce the output level.




【Playability】

It features the offset body design characteristic of Jazz Basses, ensuring excellent balance, and includes a heel cut at the neck joint.

Refined in the autumn of 2021, the design maintains the high-fret accessibility that allows fingers to reach the final fret easily, while increasing the contact area between the neck and body to improve vibration transfer and deliver a tighter sound.



The neck features a U-shape profile that strikes an exquisite balance—neither too thick nor too thin.

Renowned for being easy to grip without requiring excessive thumb pressure, it fits comfortably regardless of hand size and is designed to minimize fatigue during long playing sessions.

It features a satin finish.

This neck finish is highly recommended for players who enjoy fast playing or melodic basslines.

The edges of the fretboard are carefully rounded, ensuring smooth fingering as your hand moves along the side of the neck.




◆＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿ ◆





【Specifications】

・Wood Configuration

It employs a combination of woods considered the quintessential standard.

Body: Alder

Characterized by moderate sustain and a rich midrange. It produces a classic "bass" tone that fits perfectly into any genre.


Neck: Maple

A hard, stable wood. It sharpens the note's attack (initial response) and ensures structural strength. Fingerboard: Rosewood

It adds warmth and sweetness to the sound while gently taming harsh high frequencies, resulting in a balanced, mellow tone.


・Controls

Standard 2-volume, 1-tone configuration.

The tone knob features a push/pull switch that allows for coil-tapping (switching to single-coil mode) the bridge humbucker.

This enables a wide range of tonal possibilities.


・Frets

Features 22 frets, offering a higher fret count than traditional models.

The frets are installed in a slight arc, ensuring the strings cross the frets at a right angle.

This results in faster note attack and maintains accurate intonation even in the upper register.


・Bridge

Equipped with the FGN original FGBB-405 bridge.

Supports both string-through-body and bridge-end stringing methods.

The string spacing is fixed at 19mm, matching the standard spacing for 4-string basses.


◆＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿＿ ◆


[Included Accessories]

Soft case, hex key


[SPEC]

Body: Alder

Neck: Maple U-Shape

Fingerboard: Rosewood

Scale: 34" (864mm)

Frets: 22F Medium Jumbo C.F.S.

Tuners: GOTOH GB11W

Bridge: FGN FGBB-405 (String Pitch = 19mm)

Hardware Color: Chrome & Nickel

Pickup (Neck): Seymour Duncan Quarter-Pound SJ5-3n

Pickup (Bridge): Seymour Duncan SMB-5D

Controls: 2 Volume, 1 Tone w/ Push-Pull SW (Tap)

Body Finish: Gloss


*This item is also sold in-store and on other websites. While we strive to update stock information promptly, please accept our apologies should the item be sold out at the time of your order.

*Please note that the actual color may differ slightly from the images depending on your monitor settings.

---------------------------------------------------------

*Notice-

This item is sold both online and in our physical store, so it may be sold out. In that case, your order will be canceled. We do our best to keep our inventory updated, but please understand that such situations may be unavoidable due to the operation of our physical store.


---------------------------------------------------------

Customs Duties

For overseas customers: Import duties, taxes, and fees are not included in the product price and shipping costs. These charges are the responsibility of the buyer.


Please contact your country's customs office before bidding or purchasing to inquire about these additional costs.


Customs duties are usually charged by the shipping carrier or collected upon receipt of the goods. These fees are not additional shipping charges.


We will never understate the price of goods or list items as gifts on customs declarations. This is a violation of US and international law.


----------------------------------------------------

Shipping Carrier: FedEx


Shipping is only available to the address registered with PayPal.


If you live in a country where shipping services and fees are not specified, please contact us.


Please note that delivery may be delayed due to customs inspections, natural disasters, postal strikes, etc.


---------------------------------------------------------


Payment Method: PayPal only.


Items will be shipped within 4 business days of payment confirmation.


Return Policy: Returns are accepted.


Please contact the seller within 14 days of receiving the item.


See the "Shipping and Payment" tab for details.


Product Warranty:

Warranty is limited to Japan.


Authenticity: All items in our store are 100% authentic. Our store is a legally registered and legal business, and we comply with all rules and regulations, including the tax requirements of the Japanese government.


---------------------------------------------------------

Business Hours: 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM (Until 7:00 PM on Sundays and public holidays)

1-25-11 Minami-Ikebukuro, Toshima-ku, Tokyo, Japan, 15th Nohagi Building B1F

TEL: 03-3590-9638

Mail:

For customers residing in the United States:

Recently, there have been numerous reports of goods being temporarily seized by U.S. Customs.


You may receive a request from the shipping company to complete necessary documents.


In that case, we apologize for the inconvenience, but please complete the necessary documents and submit them to the shipping company as soon as possible.


Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: Harmonia Fretless 6 String Mid to Late 90’s - Midnight Blue Burst — $850
item.description:
$850 · Excellent · Sage's Babied Gear

If you’re looking for a bass that stands out both visually and sonically… this is it.

This is a mid-to-late 90s Japanese import fretless 6-string, and it’s an absolute sleeper. Originally bought new and played only once, this bass has spent decades in its case and it shows. The condition is exceptionally clean for its age.

Finished in a deep transparent midnight blue, the color shifts from rich navy to near-black depending on lighting, with subtle wood grain visible beneath the surface. Paired with a smooth fretless fingerboard, it delivers that expressive, singing tone that only a fretless can.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass American Professional II 2020 - Olympic White Maple Fingerboard — $1,743.24
item.description:
$1,743.24 · Excellent · Doug's Gear Outlet

The American Professional II Jazz Bass® draws from more than sixty years of innovation, inspiration and evolution to meet the demands of today's working player.

Our popular Slim "C" neck now sports smooth rolled fingerboard edges, a "Super-Natural" satin finish and a newly sculpted neck heel for a supremely comfortable feel and easy access to the upper register. New V-Mod II Jazz Bass single-coil pickups are more articulate than ever while delivering the punch and clarity the Jazz Bass is known for.

The American Pro II Jazz Bass delivers instant familiarity and sonic versatility you'll feel and hear right away, with broad ranging improvements that add up to nothing less than a new standard for professional instruments.

Features

  • Two V-Mod II single-coil Jazz Bass pickups
  • Slim "C"-shaped neck profile with rolled fingerboard edges
  • Bone nut; 20 narrow-tall frets
  • HiMass™ Vintage bridge for increased sustain
  • Posiflex™ graphite rods for neck reinforcement
  • Includes Deluxe Molded hardshell case

item.title: Greco PB-580S 3Tone Sunburst マツモク工場製【5.18kg】 — $551.52
item.description:
$551.52 · Good · Yamanashi Musical Instrument Store

The Greco PB-580S is a vintage Precision-style bass built by the renowned Matsumoku Factory, celebrated for its excellent craftsmanship and high-quality Japanese instruments.

Constructed with a maple body, maple neck, and maple fingerboard, this bass delivers a strong attack, outstanding sustain, and bright, articulate response. The all-maple construction gives it a powerful, punchy tone with excellent clarity.

A particularly attractive feature is the beautiful birdseye-like figuring visible on the back of the body, giving the instrument a unique appearance rarely found on production models.

Equipped with a traditional Precision Bass-style split-coil pickup, the PB-580S produces the thick, focused low end and punchy midrange that have made the Precision Bass a studio and stage standard.

At 5.18kg, this is a substantial instrument whose weight contributes to its impressive sustain and powerful resonance.

Approximately 80% of the fret life remains, with the action professionally set to 2.0mm on the first-string side and 2.5mm on the fourth-string side at the 12th fret, providing comfortable playability.

Cosmetically, the bass shows scratches and dents throughout, but these signs of age contribute to its authentic vintage character.

Specifications

Body: Maple

Neck: Maple

Fingerboard: Maple

Neck Joint: Bolt-On

Controls: 1 Volume, 1 Tone

Pickup Configuration: Precision Bass Split-Coil

Color: 3-Tone Sunburst

Frets: 20

Weight: 5.18kg

Condition

Built by the Matsumoku Factory.

Birdseye-like figuring on the back of the body.

Approximately 80% fret life remaining.

String gauge: .045–.105.

Action at the 12th fret: 2.0mm (1st string) / 2.5mm (4th string).

Shows scratches and dents consistent with age, giving the instrument an attractive vintage appearance.

item.title: 🎸Acoustic Electric Bass Guitar with a Rosewood Fretboard +Soft Case/Gig Bag +Strap +Cable +Picks!🎸 — $175
item.description:
$175 · Brand New · Leo Blacks Music Shack

****I accept 100% of ALL refund requests plus return shipping!****

Hi! I’m Leo Black, owner of “Leo Black’s Music Shack” and whether you're playing alone, with friends, family, at church, or on stage, you'll always sound AND look good with this beauty!

She’s a jet black acoustic-electric (Or acoustoelectric, depending on your background) bass guitar and yes, she sounds AND plays as good as she looks! I bought one for myself last year expecting a big toy that would last a few months if I was lucky, but I'm still playing her! She's amazing! The action was perfect right out of the box, the electric pickup sends a crystal clear signal to any amp or PA, and the fretboard is the same material used on Made in America Fenders! O.O

Yeah. She's awesome. And she's also available in natural or blue. Just ask for pictures! :)

My story: I've been selling guitars and guitar accessories to support local musicians with my live music production company (ICVMproductions) for over 6 years until COVID shut us down. Now, in an effort to earn the funds needed to keep the music alive, we’re opening our on-line store, “Leo Black’s Music Shack & Guitar Emporium.”

Thanks for checking out my ad, and, If you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to ask! :)

~ Leo

****I accept 100% of ALL refund requests plus return shipping!****

For more colors and styles check out our website!
